arts.ttl: Chelsea enquire about Bayern Munich striker Mathys Tel
arts.sum: Chelsea FC have enquired over a potential deal to sign Bayern Munich striker Mathys Tel (19), according to Fabrizio Romano. It has been reported that the French forward could be…

arts.ttl: Chelsea make enquiry for teenage Bayern winger Tel
arts.sum: Bayern Munich's 19-year-old winger Mathys Tel is a target for the Blues during the January transfer window with the German side interested in Chelsea forward Christopher Nkunku.

arts.ttl: Christopher Nkunku wants to join Bayern as Chelsea consider swap deal for Mathys Tel
arts.sum: According to a report from Florian Plettenberg, Christopher Nkunku (27) wants to join Bayern Munich from Chelsea FC. The two clubs may be interested in doing a swap deal with…

arts.ttl: Chelsea make move for highly-rated Bayern Munich's Mathys Tel, 19, as club lodge enquiry over £40m-rated forward - while Blues could offload £53m star in separate deal
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL: The Stamford Bridge club made overtures regarding a move for France Under 21 striker last summer and have followed up their interest with a further enquiry this month.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Chelsea in talks with Bayern over Nkunku swap deal
arts.sum: Chelsea have held initial talks with Bayern Munich over a potential swap deal for Mathys Tel and Christopher Nkunku, according to David Ornstein, Fabrizio Romano and others. According to BILD, Fabrizio Romano and David Ornstein of The Athletic, Chelsea have opened talks with Bayern to gauge whether or not a potential deal is possible.

arts.ttl: Report: £84m player Tottenham want to replace Heung-Min Son has decided he'd like to join Chelsea
arts.sum: It wouldn’t be a January transfer window without some of the big hitters in England like Chelsea and Tottenham being linked with the same player...

arts.ttl: What Renato Veiga said when he joined Chelsea now looks absolutely ridiculous as he demands Blues exit in January
arts.sum: Reports over the weekend have stated that one of the newest players to make the move to Chelsea has already decided he wants to leave...

arts.ttl: Team News: Chelsea vs. Bournemouth injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Premier League clash between Chelsea and Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted lineup vs Bournemouth - Premier League
arts.sum: Predicting how Chelsea could line up for their Premier League clash against Bournemouth on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Manchester United, Man City, Chelsea and Newcastle to rival PSG for the signing of Lucas Chevalier
arts.sum: Major Premier League clubs the likes of Manchester United, Manchester City, Chelsea and Newcastle United are reportedly set to rival PSG for the signing of Lille OSC goalkeeper Lucas Chevalier…
